ocean-documentary.label: Ocean Documentary
ocean-documentary.question: Write a review of a documentary you have watched recently.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.phrase: Start with what got you watching.
sections.idea: I recently watched
bullets: 'Our Oceans' on BBC
quick personal reaction — loved it
hint: learned surprising things

sections.title: Plot & Content
sections.phrase: Give a brief overview of what the documentary covers.
sections.idea: The documentary explores
bullets: ocean wildlife in stunning detail
threats from pollution and overfishing
stories of conservation heroes worldwide

sections.title: Best Feature
sections.phrase: By far the most impressive aspect was the underwater photography.
sections.idea: The cinematography stands out because
bullets: footage was breathtaking and unlike anything I had seen
it made complex environmental issues feel personal
emotional impact stayed with me long after watching

sections.title: Criticism
sections.phrase: However, one minor weakness was the slow pace of the middle section.
sections.idea: Despite this, it is worth watching because
bullets: the final episode more than compensates
the message about conservation is genuinely urgent
it changes the way you think about everyday choices

sections.title: Recommendation
sections.phrase: Overall, I would strongly recommend this documentary to anyone who cares about the planet.
sections.idea: It deserves a wide audience since
bullets: it is both educational and emotionally powerful
it inspires real action rather than passive sympathy

ed-sheeran-concert.label: Ed Sheeran Concert
ed-sheeran-concert.question: Write a review of a live music event you have attended.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.phrase: I attended Ed Sheeran's Mathematics Tour at Wembley Stadium last summer.
sections.idea: My expectations were high, but
bullets: the atmosphere before the show was electric
the venue was sold out — 90,000 people
it exceeded everything I had anticipated

sections.title: Performance
sections.phrase: The performance itself was truly remarkable from start to finish.
sections.idea: What made it exceptional was
bullets: Ed performed entirely alone with just a loop pedal
his voice was flawless throughout the entire show
the setlist balanced new hits with beloved classics perfectly

sections.title: Atmosphere
sections.phrase: By far the best aspect was the incredible atmosphere created by the crowd.
sections.idea: The energy in the stadium was unforgettable because
bullets: thousands of fans sang every single word together
the LED wristbands created a magical visual display
it felt like a shared experience rather than a simple concert

sections.title: Minor Criticism
sections.phrase: The only drawback was the extremely long wait to exit the venue afterwards.
sections.idea: This was a minor inconvenience given that
bullets: the show itself more than made up for it
better transport planning would have resolved the issue
such crowds are simply inevitable at events of this scale

sections.title: Recommendation
sections.phrase: I would wholeheartedly recommend this concert to any music lover.
sections.idea: If you get the chance to see Ed Sheeran live,
bullets: do not hesitate — buy tickets immediately
it is a genuinely once-in-a-lifetime experience

italian-restaurant-meal.label: Italian Restaurant
italian-restaurant-meal.question: Write a review of a restaurant you have visited recently.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.phrase: I visited La Cucina, an Italian restaurant in the city centre, for my birthday last month.
sections.idea: From the moment we arrived,
bullets: the welcoming atmosphere impressed us immediately
the décor was elegant yet relaxed and inviting
staff greeted us warmly and seated us promptly

sections.title: Food Quality
sections.phrase: The food was, without doubt, the highlight of the entire evening.
sections.idea: Every dish we ordered was
bullets: freshly prepared using high-quality ingredients
the truffle pasta was outstanding — perfectly seasoned
portions were generous without feeling excessive

sections.title: Service
sections.phrase: The service was equally impressive and contributed greatly to the experience.
sections.idea: Our waiter was attentive throughout and
bullets: gave excellent recommendations without being pushy
ensured our glasses were never empty
made us feel genuinely valued as customers

sections.title: Value for Money
sections.phrase: However, the prices were somewhat higher than expected for the area.
sections.idea: Despite this, the value was reasonable because
bullets: the quality of ingredients clearly justified the cost
the birthday dessert arrived as a complimentary gift
we left feeling the experience was worth every penny

sections.title: Recommendation
sections.phrase: I would highly recommend La Cucina for any special occasion.
sections.idea: It is the ideal choice for
bullets: a romantic dinner or a celebration with friends
anyone who appreciates authentic Italian cuisine done properly

restaurant-anniversary.label: Anniversary Dinner
restaurant-anniversary.question: Write a review of a restaurant you have visited for a special occasion.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.phrase: My partner and I visited The Harrow for our anniversary dinner last Saturday evening.
sections.idea: We had heard excellent things about it, and
bullets: the location in a converted mill was stunning
we had been looking forward to it for weeks
first impressions were immediately very positive

sections.title: Ambience
sections.phrase: The atmosphere was simply perfect for a romantic celebration.
sections.idea: Soft lighting and candlelit tables created
bullets: an intimate and genuinely special mood
a sense of occasion from the very first moment
the kind of setting that makes any evening feel memorable

sections.title: Food & Drink
sections.phrase: The food matched the setting in every way — beautifully presented and delicious.
sections.idea: The tasting menu was a highlight because
bullets: each course was thoughtfully paired with excellent wine
the lobster bisque was the finest I have ever tasted
the dessert selection showed real creative flair

sections.title: One Drawback
sections.phrase: The only disappointment was that the service felt slightly rushed during the main course.
sections.idea: This aside, the overall experience was exceptional since
bullets: the head chef came out to explain each dish personally
staff were knowledgeable, warm, and professional
we felt entirely at home in an elegant environment

sections.title: Recommendation
sections.phrase: I would unreservedly recommend The Harrow for any special occasion.
sections.idea: It is exactly the kind of place where
bullets: memories are made and celebrated in style
you leave already planning your next visit

surf-camp-portugal.label: Surf Camp Portugal
surf-camp-portugal.question: Write a review of a holiday or activity course you have taken part in.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.phrase: I spent a week at Surf Camp Algarve in Portugal last August, and it was one of the best decisions I have ever made.
sections.idea: As a complete beginner, I was nervous, but
bullets: the camp welcomed all levels of experience
the coastal setting was absolutely spectacular
I was immediately put at ease by the friendly instructors

sections.title: Instruction & Coaching
sections.phrase: The quality of instruction was outstanding throughout the entire week.
sections.idea: Coaches were patient, encouraging, and highly skilled —
bullets: lessons were broken down into clear, manageable stages
individual feedback was given after every session
by day three I was standing on the board independently

sections.title: Accommodation
sections.phrase: The accommodation was comfortable, clean, and perfectly suited to the experience.
sections.idea: Living with other participants in beach cabins meant
bullets: friendships formed instantly and naturally
the social atmosphere was relaxed and positive all week
evenings were spent sharing stories around a campfire on the beach

sections.title: Suggestion
sections.phrase: The only improvement I would suggest is a wider range of evening activities.
sections.idea: Apart from this minor point,
bullets: every other aspect of the camp was genuinely excellent
the value for money was exceptional for what was included
I returned home fitter, happier, and desperate to go back

sections.title: Recommendation
sections.phrase: I would strongly recommend Surf Camp Algarve to anyone seeking an active and memorable holiday.
sections.idea: Whether you are a complete beginner or an improver,
bullets: this camp will push you, support you, and inspire you
you will leave with new skills and lifelong memories

lonely-planet-spain.label: Spain Travel Guide
lonely-planet-spain.question: Write a review of a book you have read recently.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.phrase: I recently read the Lonely Planet guide to Spain in preparation for a two-week summer trip.
sections.idea: I picked it up because
bullets: I wanted detailed and reliable practical information
a friend had recommended the series enthusiastically
reviews online suggested it was the best available guide

sections.title: Content & Coverage
sections.phrase: The guide covers every region of Spain in impressive and useful detail.
sections.idea: What impressed me most was
bullets: the balance between major tourist sites and hidden gems
cultural background that brought each destination to life
practical advice on transport, money, and local customs

sections.title: Writing Style
sections.phrase: The writing style is clear, engaging, and genuinely enjoyable to read.
sections.idea: Unlike dry reference books, this guide
bullets: uses vivid descriptions that inspire genuine excitement
includes personal recommendations from experienced local contributors
reads almost like a travel narrative rather than a manual

sections.title: Weakness
sections.phrase: However, some of the restaurant recommendations felt slightly outdated.
sections.idea: Despite this one limitation,
bullets: the online companion app keeps information current
the maps and transport sections were impeccably accurate
it remained indispensable throughout the entire trip

sections.title: Recommendation
sections.phrase: I would highly recommend this guide to anyone planning a visit to Spain.
sections.idea: It is essential reading because
bullets: it will save you time, money, and unnecessary stress
it transforms a good holiday into a genuinely great one

atomic-habits-book.label: Atomic Habits
atomic-habits-book.question: Write a review of a book you have read recently.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.phrase: I recently read Atomic Habits by James Clear after seeing it recommended by several people I respect.
sections.idea: I was sceptical at first, but
bullets: the opening chapter immediately challenged my assumptions
the writing was far more readable than I had expected
I found myself unable to put it down

sections.title: Key Ideas
sections.phrase: The book's central argument is that small, consistent changes lead to remarkable long-term results.
sections.idea: Clear explains the science behind habits by showing
bullets: how a 1% daily improvement compounds dramatically over time
why identity-based habits are more powerful than goal-based ones
how environment design shapes behaviour more than willpower alone

sections.title: Practical Value
sections.phrase: What makes this book exceptional is how practical and immediately applicable it is.
sections.idea: Every chapter ends with concrete strategies including
bullets: habit stacking — linking new habits to existing ones
making bad habits invisible and good habits obvious
real-world examples from sport, business, and personal life

sections.title: Minor Criticism
sections.phrase: The later chapters occasionally repeat earlier points in slightly different forms.
sections.idea: This is a relatively minor weakness given that
bullets: the core framework is genuinely original and powerful
the repetition perhaps reinforces the key messages
the overall impact of the book is impossible to deny

sections.title: Recommendation
sections.phrase: I would recommend Atomic Habits to absolutely everyone, regardless of their goals.
sections.idea: Whether you want to exercise more, study better, or change any habit,
bullets: this book will give you the tools and the mindset to succeed
it is quite simply one of the most useful books I have ever read

duolingo-app.label: Duolingo App
duolingo-app.question: Write a review of an app or website you use regularly.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.phrase: I have been using Duolingo to learn Spanish for the past six months, completing a lesson almost every day.
sections.idea: What drew me to it initially was
bullets: it was completely free and required no registration fee
the format looked engaging rather than textbook-like
friends had used it successfully to reach conversational level

sections.title: Design & Usability
sections.phrase: The app's design is clean, intuitive, and genuinely enjoyable to use.
sections.idea: The gamified approach works well because
bullets: daily streaks and XP points build consistent motivation
lessons are short enough to complete during a commute
the visual feedback makes progress feel real and rewarding

sections.title: Learning Effectiveness
sections.phrase: For vocabulary building and basic grammar, Duolingo is highly effective.
sections.idea: After six months I can confidently
bullets: hold basic conversations with native Spanish speakers
understand menus, signs, and simple instructions abroad
recognise and use over 800 words in everyday contexts

sections.title: Limitation
sections.phrase: However, Duolingo alone is insufficient for reaching genuine fluency.
sections.idea: To progress beyond intermediate level, users need to
bullets: supplement the app with conversation practice and real media
study grammar rules in greater systematic depth
immerse themselves in the language beyond short daily exercises

sections.title: Recommendation
sections.phrase: Overall, I would recommend Duolingo enthusiastically as a starting point for language learning.
sections.idea: It is best used as
bullets: a daily habit-building tool alongside other learning methods
the perfect way to start a language before travelling abroad

film-intern.label: The Intern (Film)
film-intern.question: Write a review of a film you have seen recently.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.phrase: I recently watched The Intern, a comedy-drama directed by Nancy Meyers, on a streaming platform.
sections.idea: I chose it because
bullets: the cast including Robert De Niro and Anne Hathaway appealed to me
reviews suggested it was warm, funny, and thought-provoking
I was in the mood for something uplifting and intelligent

sections.title: Story & Characters
sections.phrase: The film follows a 70-year-old retired businessman who becomes a senior intern at a tech startup.
sections.idea: What makes it compelling is
bullets: the unlikely but deeply genuine friendship that develops between them
De Niro's quiet dignity contrasted with the chaos of modern startup life
the way it challenges assumptions about age and relevance at work

sections.title: Performances
sections.phrase: Both lead performances are wonderful and carry the film with ease.
sections.idea: De Niro is particularly impressive because
bullets: he brings warmth and understated humour to every scene
his character is written with rare depth and humanity
the chemistry with Hathaway feels completely natural and unforced

sections.title: Criticism
sections.phrase: The film does feel slightly predictable and overlong in its final third.
sections.idea: Despite this,
bullets: the emotional payoff in the final scene is genuinely moving
the messages about work, family, and purpose resonate long after
it remains a deeply enjoyable and comforting watch

sections.title: Recommendation
sections.phrase: I would recommend The Intern to anyone who enjoys feel-good films with genuine heart.
sections.idea: It is perfect for
bullets: a relaxed evening when you want to feel uplifted and inspired
anyone who appreciates intelligent, warm-hearted storytelling

stardew-valley-game.label: Stardew Valley
stardew-valley-game.question: Write a review of a video game you have played recently.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.phrase: I have been playing Stardew Valley, a farming and life simulation game, for the past two months.
sections.idea: I downloaded it on a whim and
bullets: immediately became completely absorbed in its world
found myself playing for hours without realising the time
it quickly became my favourite way to unwind after school

sections.title: Gameplay
sections.phrase: The core gameplay involves managing a farm, building relationships, and exploring a mine.
sections.idea: What makes it addictive is the satisfying loop of
bullets: planting crops, harvesting them, and reinvesting the profits
unlocking new areas, characters, and storylines progressively
making daily decisions about priorities with genuinely interesting trade-offs

sections.title: Art & Music
sections.phrase: The pixel art style and original soundtrack are both absolutely charming.
sections.idea: The aesthetic is deceptively simple because
bullets: each season brings beautifully different visual palettes and weather
the music adapts perfectly to mood, time of day, and location
the overall result is a game that feels genuinely cosy and calming

sections.title: Criticism
sections.phrase: The main weakness is the lack of clear direction for new players.
sections.idea: Some beginners may feel lost initially, but
bullets: the online community provides excellent guides and support
the freedom itself becomes a feature rather than a flaw over time
patience in the early hours is richly rewarded

sections.title: Recommendation
sections.phrase: I would strongly recommend Stardew Valley to anyone looking for a relaxing and rewarding game.
sections.idea: It is particularly perfect for
bullets: players who want creativity and freedom over competition and stress
anyone who enjoys building something beautiful at their own pace
